bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingMark Levinson 600 SeriesPosted on June 11, 2025Mark Levinson 600 SeriesThe 600 Series redefines what’s possible from preamplifiers and amplifiers, delivering an experience of power, precision, and purity that is unmistakably Mark Levinson.The series introduces three new reference components: the № 626 dual-monaural preamplifier, the № 632 dual-monaural amplifier, and the flagship № 631 Monaural Amplifier — all designed, engineered, and assembled in the USA.‍‍Each model is built upon Mark Levinson’s proprietary Pure Path circuit philosophy and features the brand’s iconic Tectonic industrial design, which is sculpted from solid aluminum and accented with red signature lighting that glows like embers beneath volcanic glass. Every detail, from the custom-machined enclosures to the glass core and mechanically isolated foot architecture, speaks to the brand’s commitment to performance and purity.№ 626: The № 626 dual-monaural preamplifier is a celebration of sonic fidelity, blending an all-analog signal path with a high-resolution digital core. At its heart is the Precision Link III DAC, capable of decoding up to 32-bit/384 kHz PCM and native DSD audio through its six digital inputs. The analog stage is anchored by a fully balanced Pure Path architecture, while a Pure Phono MM/MC phono stage and Main Drive Class A headphone amplifier make the № 626 a complete solution for every source. Designed with modular isolation, dual power supplies, and vibration-damped foot architecture, this is a preamplifier that lets the music speak for itself and say everything.№ 632 and № 631: Designed for those who demand authority and refinement in equal measure, the № 632 dual-monaural amplifier and № 631 monaural amplifier deliver dynamic headroom and clarity that unveil the full scale of a performance.Both amplifiers feature Class A/AB operation, Pure Path fully balanced signal paths, and robust toroidal power supplies housed within their own dedicated modular chassis. The № 632 offers stereo flexibility and dual-mono separation, while the № 631 delivers uncompromised performance as a single-channel powerhouse.The Mark Levinson 600 Series will be available in Q4 2025 through select Mark Levinson retailers and partners worldwide. The recommended retail prices are $25,000 USD for the № 626 or $30,000 USD for the № 632, and $40,000 USD for a single № 631.For more information, visit https://www.marklevinson.com.‍‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‍‍‍Services:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‍Proudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley ‍‍‍‍‍‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright © 2023.
